About Me

Hi, I'm the designer
behind The Renter's Edit

I know exactly what it feels like to live in a rental that belongs to someone else. White walls, beige carpets, landlord furniture — it's uninspiring, and it affects how you feel coming home every single day.

That's why I started The Renter's Edit — to give renters the same quality of design thinking that homeowners get, built entirely around the constraints of renting. No damage. No lost deposits. Just a space that finally feels like yours.

Based in London and working entirely remotely, I specialise in sustainable, budget-conscious transformations for renters across Canary Wharf and beyond.

Sustainability first — every options list prioritises natural materials, second-hand finds and UK-made products.
Real budgets — I work within what you actually have, not what a magazine says you should spend.
Renter-first always — deposit safety isn't an afterthought, it's the foundation of every recommendation I make.
The Renter's Edit

Deposit-safe, sustainable interior design for renters across London.

Investment

Design worth investing in

Every package begins with a complimentary consultation. Options lists delivered in days, not weeks. Second list available as a £150 add-on per area.

Not happy with your options list? Request a second one for £150 per room — available on any package.
What to expect
📞

Step 1 — Complimentary Consultation

A relaxed Zoom conversation to understand your space and style before you commit to anything.

Cost: Complimentary · Platform: Zoom
🎥

Step 2 — Full Consultation

A recorded Zoom call where you walk us through your space. We ask about your taste and lifestyle.

Duration: 30 or 60 min · Recorded · Consent required at booking
📋

Step 3 — Your Options List

Delivered in days, not weeks. You choose what you love. Second list £150/area add-on.

Turnaround: Days, not weeks · Add-on: £150 per area

Your Consultation

All consultations via Zoom

Every call is recorded so you have a full reference — and so do we.

Zoom gives us the ability to record your call, share screens to show you inspiration, and auto-transcribe everything that was discussed — so nothing gets lost or forgotten.

🎥

Recorded for your reference

You'll receive a copy to rewatch while shopping.

🖥️

Screen sharing

We show you live inspiration and mood board ideas during the call.

📝

Auto-transcribed

A written record of every recommendation made.

📱

Any device

Join from phone, tablet or laptop — no tech knowledge needed.

How your Zoom call works
From booking to options list in days, not weeks
1
Book via our Calendly link — automatic Zoom invite sent to your email.
2
Join the call. Recording starts with your consent.
3
Walk us through your space. We ask about your style and lifestyle.
4
Within Days, not weeks you receive your curated options list by email.
5
You choose what you love. Need a second list? £150 per room add-on.
📋 Recording consent: By booking you agree your call will be recorded. You will receive a copy.
Days,
Not weeks
100%
Deposit safe

Complimentary consultation
£150
Add-on/room
Disclaimer — The Renter's Edit provides design suggestions only. We are not responsible for any damage to rental properties. Always test products on a small area first and check your tenancy agreement before making changes.
